title: Aahaa Kathal Vandhu  Lyrics Valiyavan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Aahaa Kathal Vandhu Song Lyrics
Valiyavan
Singer: KG Ranjith
Lyrics : Na. Muthukumar &  Viveka

Aahaa Kathal Vandhu
adichi thuvaikka,
adadaa thappi sella nenachen.

Aanaa aasa
onnu manasil kudhikka.
Thaana maattikittu mulichen.

Azhagaale sirichaale
ava kannum rendum pammbaram
adhile poi vilundhaale
thala suththi mayakkam
vandhidum.

Therinjey naan
tholanjey ponen.

Aahaa Kathal Vandhu
adichi thuvaikka,
adadaa thappi sella nenachen.

Aanaa aasa
onnu manasil kudhikka.
Thaana maattikittu mulichen.

Dhevadhai azhagil aval
ratchasa anbil aval
nodiyinil varuvaal
udan maraivaal
minnlae.

kalayin kadhirum aval
kulappidum pudhirum aval
en manakkadhavai thirandhuvidum
jannale

ennoda edhirkaalam
neethaane nill
un nenjil naan vazha
idam undaa sol
ennachu enakku
pudichchaachu kirukku

Therinjey naan
tholanjey ponen.

Aahaa Kathal Vandhu
adichi thuvaikka,
adadaa thappi sella nenachen.

Adikkadi thookkam keda
adithadi nenjil vara
idhu enna valiyaa
illai sugamaa
sollida

mael imai kaaichchal thara
keel imai marundhai thara
un mugavariyayai
maraippadhenna
thandhidu

aaalillaa theevaaga
aaneney naan
angae nee vandhaaley
pizhaippeney vaa

paer theriyaa poove
poi pesum azhage.

Therinjey naan
tholanjey ponen.

Aahaa Kathal Vandhu
adichi thuvaikka,
adadaa thappi sella nenachen.

Azhagaale sirichaale
ava kannum rendum pammbaram
adhile poi vilundhaale
thala suththi mayakkam
vandhidum.

Therinjey naan
tholanjey ponen.

seo.description: Full Aahaa Kathal Vandhu songs lyrics, Valiyavan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Na Muthukumar, Music: D Imman, Singer(s): K.G.Ranjith.
seo.keywords: Na Muthukumar, Valiyavan, D Imman, K.G.Ranjith, Aahaa Kathal Vandhu full lyrics, Valiyavan songs lyrics, Aahaa Kathal Vandhu lyrics snippets, Aahaa Kathal Vandhu WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Aahaa Kathal Vandhu lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Aahaa Kathal Vandhu from the movie Valiyavan. Sung soulfully by K.G. Ranjith, with lyrics penned by Na. Muthukumar and music composed by D. Imman, this song captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into this romantic masterpiece and let its soothing tunes elevate your mood.
stanzaMeanings: Aahaa, love has come, striking and stirring emotions.
Aahaa, love has come, striking and stirring emotions; I thought of escaping.
But a desire stirred in my heart; I got caught and immersed.
When she smiles beautifully, her eyes spin like tops, and I fall into them, feeling dizzy.
Knowing, I lost myself.
Aahaa, love has come, striking and stirring emotions; I thought of escaping.
But a desire stirred in my heart; I got caught and immersed.
In angelic beauty, she is fierce in love; she appears instantly and vanishes like lightning.
Her radiant charm puzzles and captivates; she opens the window to my mind.
You are my future; tell me if there's a place for me in your heart. I like your craziness.
Knowing, I lost myself.
Aahaa, love has come, striking and stirring emotions; I thought of escaping.
Often, sleep eludes me, and my heart feels restless. Is this pain or pleasure? Tell me.
The upper eyelid gives fever, the lower eyelid gives medicine. Why does your address hide? Give it to me.
I became an uninhabited island; if you come there, I will be revived. Come.
A nameless flower speaks with beauty.
Knowing, I lost myself.
Aahaa, love has come, striking and stirring emotions; I thought of escaping.
When she smiles beautifully, her eyes spin like tops, and I fall into them, feeling dizzy.
Knowing, I lost myself.
